name: Bacardi Ltd.
lede: Bacardi runs two centers across two Indian cities. Gurugram and Mysuru, covering GBS and R&D, built over 30 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Bacardi office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Bacardi Ltd. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Bacardi runs 2 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Gurugram, Mysuru), covering GBS and R&D. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

about.description: Bacardi's India footprint covers Gurugram and Mysuru, spanning GBS and R&D. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all eleven decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.a: Bacardi operates 2 active centers in India.
